metadata.title: County Property Tax Rates and Veteran Exemptions — OH
metadata.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemption implementation details, and application information for high-veteran-population counties in Ohio.

notes.tax_rate_format: Effective rate per $100 of assessed value (applied to market value).
notes.assessment_note: Ohio assesses residential property at 35% of market value. Effective rates shown are market-value-based (millage × 35%).
notes.veteran_exemption_note: Ohio ORC Sec. 323.152: Full property tax exemption on primary residence for 100% P&T disabled veterans. No income limit. Apply through county auditor.
notes.update_cycle: Tax rates set annually by county auditors.

property_tax.notes: Cuyahoga County (Cleveland area) has the highest effective property tax rate in Ohio.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% P&T service-connected disability or IU at 100%; OH resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.savings_basis: Cuyahoga County median home $195,000 × 1.80% effective rate
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: Full exemption under ORC Sec. 323.152. No income limit. Apply with county auditor's office. Surviving unremarried spouse retains the exemption.

documentation: VA Summary of Benefits Letter or Rating Decision
Proof of OH residency and ownership

property_tax.notes: Franklin County (Columbus area). Contains Rickenbacker ANG Base and Defense Supply Center Columbus.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% P&T service-connected disability or IU at 100%; OH resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.savings_basis: Franklin County median home $250,000 × 1.40% effective rate
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: Full exemption under ORC Sec. 323.152. No income limit. Apply with Franklin County Auditor.

documentation: VA Summary of Benefits Letter or Rating Decision
Proof of OH residency and ownership

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% P&T service-connected disability or IU at 100%; OH resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.savings_basis: Hamilton County median home $245,000 × 1.44% effective rate
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: Full exemption under ORC Sec. 323.152. No income limit. Apply with Hamilton County Auditor.

documentation: VA Summary of Benefits Letter or Rating Decision
Proof of OH residency and ownership

property_tax.notes: Montgomery County (Dayton area). Home of Wright-Patterson AFB — very high veteran and active-duty population.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% P&T service-connected disability or IU at 100%; OH resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.savings_basis: Montgomery County median home $175,000 × 1.55% effective rate
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: Full exemption under ORC Sec. 323.152. Wright-Patterson AFB retirees: this exemption is particularly valuable in this county. Apply with Montgomery County Auditor.

documentation: VA Summary of Benefits Letter or Rating Decision
Proof of OH residency and ownership

property_tax.notes: Summit County (Akron metro). Ohio assesses at 35% of market value. 74 taxing authorities; rates vary significantly by district. Recent reappraisal showed avg 30.8% increase in property values.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% P&T service-connected disability or IU at 100%; OH resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.savings_basis: Summit County median home $229,000 × 1.45% effective rate
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: Full exemption under ORC Sec. 323.152. No income limit. Apply with county auditor's office.

documentation: VA Summary of Benefits Letter or Rating Decision
